step1.welcome_body: Experience minimalist navigation with ultra-modern efficiency.

step3.title: Your profile
step3.body: Your name is only used for sharing features. You can keep it private if you prefer.

step4.heading: Permissions
step4.description: To provide the best navigation experience, Octara Maps needs the following access:
step4.warning_partial: Some features will be unavailable if not all permissions are granted.
step4.warning_accuracy_description: Precise navigation requires precise location. You can continue, but the experience will be degraded.
step4.location_body: Enable precise navigation and real-time traffic updates.
step4.notifications_body: Stay informed with arrival alerts and route changes.
step4.contacts_body: Easily find and navigate to your friends' addresses.

step5.heading: Privacy Control
step5.description: Choose how much data you'd like to share to help us improve your navigation experience.
step5.option_total_body: Includes Debug & Error reports for full optimization
step5.option_necessary_body: Sends critical error reports only to ensure stability
step5.option_limited_body: Tracks install counts anonymously for growth stats
step5.option_none_body: No data leaves this device and no requests go through our servers
step5.none_warning: With this option you must choose a routing engine and, if required, supply your own API key

step3_required: Please enter a name or stay anonymously to continue.
